Oxfam is What Unites George Soros, Harsh Mander and Ashoka University

# Oxfam is What Unites George Soros, Harsh Mander and Ashoka University

### In the second and concluding part of this series, we briefly unravel the labyrinthine network of Oxfam and its dangerous games in India

CONTINUING THE THREAD on Oxfam from [the previous part](https://thedharmadispatch.substack.com/p/india-as-oxfams-playground), here is a small data point that quantifies the scale at which it operates. Oxfam is a direct partner of the British Government, which paid it 20 *million Pounds* (GBP) in grants between 2002-2005.

Oxfam’s labyrinthine web of global connections can be traced to the notorious Unitarian Universalist Holde…
